name: Sunset Jewelry and Pawn
description_short: Sunset Jewelry and Pawn buys and sells luxury watches, jewelry, diamonds, and designer handbags in Sunset, Florida, with a focus on high-end authenticated pieces.
description_long:
Sunset Jewelry and Pawn operates as a pawn shop specializing in luxury goods in Sunset, Florida. The business is positioned as a buyer and seller of high-end items, with a curated online inventory accessible through their website at sunsetjewelryandpawn.com. They can be reached at 786-360-3883 and maintain active social media presence on Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok.

The company offers multiple services centered around luxury goods. They buy and sell certified luxury watches from brands including Rolex, Cartier, Hublot, Patek Philippe, Richard Mille, Tag Heuer, IWC, and Audemars Piguet, with items ranging from $1,500 to $20,000. They purchase and sell fine jewelry including diamond pieces, gold and platinum designs, and designer items from brands like Van Cleef & Arpels and Cartier. The business also buys and sells diamonds, designer handbags from brands like Hermès and Chanel, and offers auto pawn services using cars, trucks, or boats as collateral for immediate cash.

Sunset Jewelry and Pawn distinguishes itself through emphasis on authentication and quality inspection. Their website highlights that each item is "thoroughly inspected for quality and authenticity." They position their selling process as "simple, private, and professional" and emphasize competitive valuation by experienced evaluators. The company maintains an online storefront showcasing specific luxury inventory with pricing transparency.

The main limitation is that as a luxury-focused pawn shop, their services are accessible primarily to consumers with high-value items to sell or substantial budgets for purchases. The business model relies on customers possessing or seeking luxury goods rather than serving general quick-cash lending needs. Limited operational information is publicly available regarding loan terms, interest rates, buyback periods, or standard pawn procedures.
pros: Specializes in authenticated luxury watches and jewelry with brands like Rolex, Patek Philippe, and Hublot, providing quality assurance through inspection
Offers multiple collateral options including luxury watches, jewelry, diamonds, designer handbags, and vehicles (auto pawn) for immediate cash
Maintains transparent online inventory with specific pricing displayed for featured items ($1,500-$20,000 range)
Provides both buying and selling services, allowing consumers to liquidate luxury items or purchase authenticated pieces
Emphasizes private and professional transaction process with experienced evaluators for fair market valuations
Offers auto pawn services specifically for immediate cash using cars, trucks, or boats as collateral
Active online presence with website, social media channels, and mobile accessibility for customer engagement
cons: Limited to customers with high-value luxury items; not accessible for consumers needing quick cash without premium collateral
No publicly disclosed information about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or standard pawn procedures on the website
Requires items to meet luxury brand/authentication standards, potentially excluding mid-range or vintage non-certified goods
Website provides minimal details about auto pawn loan specifics, terms, or competitive rates compared to standard auto title lenders
No information about physical location hours, appointment requirements, or whether walk-in service is available
best_for: Affluent consumers seeking to liquidate luxury watches, jewelry, or designer handbags for immediate cash
Collectors and investors looking to purchase authenticated luxury timepieces or fine jewelry at competitive prices
Vehicle owners needing emergency cash who can use their car, truck, or boat as collateral
Consumers with high-value items seeking authentication and fair market valuations from experienced specialists
diagnosis: Sunset Jewelry and Pawn is best suited for affluent consumers with luxury items to sell or substantial budgets to purchase authenticated high-end goods. The primary caveat is that this business serves a niche market requiring valuable collateral or purchasing power and does not function as a traditional quick-cash lender for consumers without luxury assets.
services: Purchase and sale of luxury watches from Rolex, Cartier, Hublot, Patek Philippe, Richard Mille, Tag Heuer, IWC, and Audemars Piguet
Fine jewelry buying and selling including diamond pieces, gold, and platinum designs
Diamond purchase and appraisal with fair market value assessment
Designer handbag buying from brands including Hermès and Chanel
Auto pawn loans secured by vehicles (cars, trucks, boats) for immediate cash
Item authentication and quality inspection for purchased goods
Online luxury goods marketplace and storefront
Designer item sales including Van Cleef & Arpels and Cartier pieces
Free quotes for designer items and luxury goods
